title: solanum ochroleucum var. flavum
intro: Solanum ochroleucum var. flavum, also known as yellow-berried deadly nightshade or yellow-berried bittersweet nightshade, is a variety of the Solanum ochroleucum plant, which belongs to the Solanaceae family of flowering plants. The plant is known for its yellow berries and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Solanum ochroleucum var. flavum include its potential to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
